events.title: Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA)
events.description:
Integrated Kundalini Awakening – A Life-Altering Energy Transmission

During this event, you'll receive a direct energy transmission, awakening your Kundalini Shakti – the latent, divine, and healing energy within every individual. This awakening triggers a remarkable rewiring of your brain and central nervous system, leading to profound emotional and spiritual healing, often unattainable through other means.

As the raw Kundalini life force awakens and surges through your spine, you'll embark on a path to uncover your truest, most powerful, and divine self. This energy purges stored blockages within your energy system, guiding you toward transcendence and elevating your consciousness. It's a journey of rebirth, love, and surrender.

What Can You Expect During a Session? Lie down on a comfortable mat as soothing music plays in the background. The facilitator may gently touch or press certain chakras and meridian points on your body or use hand movements above you. Internally, a wide range of experiences may unfold, from spontaneous movements and emotional release to vivid lights, visuals, and a sense of bliss. Many describe it as a purifying experience, offering deep insights and realizations that lead to physical, mental, energetic, and emotional release. It's a transformative journey beyond the reach of mere words.

Kundalini energy clears accumulated blockages in your energy system, promotes the development of all energy centers, brings clarity and self-understanding to life, restores inner strength and self-confidence, increases energy potential, which leads to financial expansion, enhances sexuality, cultivates a state of happiness, and promotes harmony and tranquility. After a certain number of sessions you will feel more alive and orgasmic.

IMPORTANT: This is not Kundalini yoga session and meditation. This is a life force energy awakening where you can experience strong emotional or physical release, an energetic shift or a visual download. Get ready for a transformative journey.

Before the Session:

 
 Arrive a few minutes early to get settled.

 
 
 Wear loose, comfortable clothing, avoiding clothing with metal zippers or snaps down the front.

 
 
 Consider eating lightly or not at all before the session; an empty stomach is ideal, but a light snack such as fruit is acceptable.

 
 
 If you consume meat, try to refrain from it in the days leading up to the session.

 
 
 Avoid coffee, alcohol, or other substances prior to the class.

 

 
 This session can only be joined by adults 16+

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Anna Sohana has dedicated her life to helping others awaken their inner potential and activate the Divine within themselves.

Her grounded and embodied approach to spiritual practices allows everyone to dive deeply into self-discovery and personal transformation.

Anna has been practicing many forms of Holistic Healing for over 20 years. She is a Certified Yoga Teacher, Body Therapist, Musically Trained Sound Healing Practitioner, Breathwork Facilitator, Certified Astrologer and Facilitator of Integrated Kundalini Awakening (IKA).

Anna offers shamanic ceremonies, groups, private sessions and education. Her global mission is to change people's understanding of their relationship with themselves and the world around them, to enable them to create a life based on their fundamental needs for joy and freedom.

events.title: Introduction to Healing Dance
events.description: A Movement-Based Aquatic Bodywork Training, Practitioner Path. Healing Dance is a deep and beautiful pathway into aquatic bodywork, balancing precise technical study with embodied wisdom, presence, and receiver attunement. In this training, we study technique carefully so it can become natural in the body. From there, we can begin to move beyond technique, listening, adapting, and responding to the receiver in each unfolding moment. For many people, this is the missing experience in their lives: attuned support. This training is open to trained aquatic bodyworkers, movement practitioners, dancers, bodyworkers, and complete beginners alike.
events.short_description: A Movement-Based Aquatic Bodywork Training, Practitioner Path, in Bali from July 11-13. 25-Hour Certified Training Recognized by WABA.

events.title: DISSOLVE :: PLAY - INTUITIVE CONTACT IMPROV JOURNEY
events.description: This journey through conscious movement is inspired by contact improvisation, intuitive movement and authentic relating. A big YES to exploring and honouring your boundaries is encouraged here – guided exercises will be facilitated in support of what authentically feels good for you. Bring your curiosity, playfulness and a desire to dive into deeper ways of connecting with yourself and those around you. 11:00-11:40 Guided Warm up - Dropping into your body, 11:40-12:50 Free movement jam with well crafted music journey, 12:50-1:00p Closing circle. This event has been on since 2015, you will expecting 70-90 regular and visiting movers.
events.short_description: Intuitive Contact Improv Journey with guided warm-up, free movement jam, and closing circle.
events.venue_address: Jl. Goutama Sel., Ubud, Gianyar, Bali, Indonesia

events.title: Making Balinese Offerings Canang Sari
events.description:
Step into the heart of Balinese culture through a meaningful and sacred experience. In this workshop, you will learn the beautiful art of making traditional Balinese offerings, a practice filled with gratitude, intention, and devotion.

Each flower, leaf, and element carries a symbolic meaning, inviting us to slow down, connect, and honor the balance between nature, spirit, and daily life.

This experience is not only about learning a tradition, but also about feeling the beauty of presence, connection, and cultural wisdom—a moment to slow down, open the heart, and receive the peaceful energy of Bali. 🌿✨
events.short_description: Learn the art of making traditional Balinese offerings (Canang Sari) and connect with Balinese culture.
events.venue_address: Jl. Cempaka Putih, Ubud, Bali, Indonesia

events.title: Return to Calm: Nervous System Regulation
events.description: Understand stress, anxiety, fatigue, and chronic illness through the lens of your nervous system. This is an intro workshop to learning about Somatic Experience principles and practices to support your body's natural capacity to regulate and heal. You'll leave with: • A clear understanding of how chronic stress and trauma live in the body, and not just the mind. • Simple somatic tools to ground, self-regulate, and return to calm in daily life. • Greater attunement to your body's needs, limits, and cues for rest or safety. • A felt sense of inner steadiness and confidence that healing can happen through gentle, body-led awareness.
events.short_description: Intro workshop to Somatic Experience principles and practices for nervous system regulation and healing.

events.title: Singing Together: Weekly Mantra & Music Circle #55 Kirtan with Alexandra McRobert & Friends
events.description:
Singing Together: Weekly Mantra & Music Circle – Different Artists Every Week

Every Tuesday, we come together as a community to sing, connect, and open our soul's voices through the power of sound. Each week, a different musician or group shares their unique flavor of Kirtan, mantras, or medicine music. It’s not about performance — it’s about connection, presence, and a shared voice.

We invite you to join our warm community and experience the transformative power of music and connection.

Come as you are, sing with us, and feel the magic of community through sound.

circle #55 Kirtan with Alexandra McRobert

Alexandra guides Kirtan in a way that feels open and inclusive to all, weaving music, silence, and devotion into one collective offering.

Join Alexandra for an evening of heart-opening kirtan at Sayuri’s — a sacred space to rest, release, and reconnect through mantra and song.

Kirtan is a form of meditation through music: we chant mantras together in a call-and-response style, allowing the mind to soften and the heart to open. No experience is needed. You don’t need a “good voice.” Just come as you are.

This is a space for: •⁠ ⁠Letting go of stress and overthinking •⁠ ⁠Reconnecting with devotion and inner peace •⁠ ⁠⁠ Feeling held in community •⁠ ⁠⁠ Resting in sound, breath, and presence

Whether you’re new to kirtan or have been practicing for years, you are warmly welcome.

Come sing, listen, pray, breathe, and remember who you are beneath the noise of daily life.

All levels welcome.

 

Limited space available – reserve your spot now.

Tickets:

Early birds – IDR 150K

On the day – IDR 200K

Tickets are available online and at the door.

events.title: Love is the answer : A soul evening of live original music
events.description:
Love Is the Answer is an intimate concert experience exploring the universal language of love through original compositions and live improvisation. This special evening brings together a unique ensemble of musicians led by pianist, singer, and composer Alina Gamerova.

Alina's music combines neoclassical piano, soulful vocals, and world music influences, creating a sound that is both deeply personal and universally resonant. Her compositions move between moments of stillness and intensity, inviting listeners into a space of presence, beauty, and emotional depth.

For this concert, Alina is joined by Rio (violin), Basouki Uki (guitar and bamboo flute), Petuk Lanang (percussion), and Jim Beckwith (vocals). Together they create a rich and dynamic soundscape where diverse musical traditions meet in harmony.

Throughout the evening, music becomes a bridge between cultures, emotions, and shared human experience. Whether gentle and meditative or uplifting and celebratory, each piece offers an invitation to listen deeply and connect with the essence of love beyond words.

Join us for an unforgettable evening of music, presence, and connection, and experience the transformative power of sound. Let yourself be inspired, uplifted, and carried by the universal language of music.

ABOUT THE ARTIST

Alina Gamerova is a pianist, singer, and composer whose music blends neoclassical, soulful, and world music influences. She began composing at the age of six and later studied vocal performance at Kazan State University of Culture and Art. With seven albums and numerous singles released in English, Indonesian, and Russian, her work reflects a lifelong passion for creating music that inspires connection, beauty, and inner transformation. Since 2022, she has been performing throughout Bali, sharing original concerts that bring people together through the universal language of music

events.title: Women's Initiation Retreat into the Animate Goddess
events.description:
For 7 days, we gather in one of Bali's most untouched regions to immerse ourselves in the living traditions of the Goddess through ritual, prayer, song, sacred waters, temple pilgrimages, Balinese ceremonies, voice liberation, embodiment, and sisterhood.
Held at the beautiful Bumi Cinta, nestled amongst waterfalls, mountains, and ocean views, this retreat is an invitation to step away from the noise of everyday life and into a deeper relationship with yourself, the Earth, and the sacred. 
This is the weaving together of decades of devotion, study, prayer, and lived practice that Evy and I have each cultivated on our own paths. It is a labour of love and an offering from our hearts.
events.short_description: A 7-day Women's Initiation Retreat in North Bali to immerse in the living traditions of the Goddess through ritual, prayer, song, ceremonies, embodiment, and sisterhood.

events.title: Root Riot: Ecstatic Dance x Live Plant Sonics

Featuring Nurvitria (ecstatic DJ Set) and Tanaman Liar (Live Plant Sonics). Please arrive 10 minutes early. The ground is already in motion. No phones. No photos.

events.title: Foundations of Flight
events.description:
Transitioning into the air is more than "muscling through" it’s a calculated balance of physics and focus. Foundations of Flight deconstructs arm balances into four essential pillars: wrist mobility, core integration, shoulder stability, and the art of the counterweight. On this workshop, we learn to use your fingertips as brakes and your core to create lightness. Whether you’re aiming for Crow Pose or a Handstand, you’ll gain the structural integrity needed to defy gravity with grace.

 

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Made Murni, 500h Registered Yoga Teacher shifted from completely rejecting yoga at first to 14 years of constant and intense yoga practice.

Made Murni shares her personal yoga journey, her fears, spiritual beliefs and wisdom as a Yoga Teacher to beginners and advanced practitioners alike.

Murni has been working at Yoga Barn since its inception in 2007 and for the past 8 years, she’s been teaching daily classes and running international workshops as a lead yoga teacher on various Yoga Teacher Training (YTT) faculties.

events.title: Dance Refuge
events.description:
In a time of rapid change and deep feeling, our bodies are being asked to process more than ever.

We begin by gently opening the body through yoga, creating space to listen inward. From there, we move into ecstatic dance… awakening expression, releasing what is held, and reconnecting to the pulse of life. We close with Yin Yoga, softening into stillness to integrate and restore.

All are welcome. Come as you are.

ABOUT THE FACILITATOR

Sophie Sofree is a sonic weaver known for her ability to craft dance journeys that awaken the primal and the sacred. Her offerings weave together ecstatic dance, sacred bass, ceremony, and the raw truth of emotional alchemy. Having walked through the fire of deep personal grief, Sophie brings a rare tenderness and depth to her sets—creating containers where rage, sorrow, joy, and stillness are all welcome. Grief lives in her bones, not as heaviness, but as a compass—guiding her into ever deeper truth, compassion, and presence.

Each of her musical journeys is a ritual: a layered unfolding of tribal rhythms, medicine music, ancestral echoes, soul-stirring bass, and spacious integration. Her presence invites dancers to release, remember, and return—to the wisdom of their bodies, the voice of their hearts, and the quiet resilience of the human spirit.

She believes that grief is not something to get over—but something to dance with, to breathe with, and ultimately… to love.

 

NOTES:

 If you have any issues with online payments, please email bookings@theyogabarn.com or WhatsApp The Yoga Barn Hotline (+62) 811 3983 789  We're here to help!
 Registration and payment can also be made at The Yoga Barn Reception
 If you see ticket sales are closed for the Event, contact us by WhatsApp to see if there is still space available!
 For special class, workshop and night event, Children under the age of 10 are not permitted to join , there are NO EXCEPTIONS to this rule. Children ages 10-15 must be accompanied by a parent/guardian or sibling that is over 18

Refund Policy:

If you are unable to attend this event, you are eligible for a full refund of the ticket price if you contact us at least 24 hours in advance of the published start time. Contact must be made via email to bookings@theyogabarn.com  or in person at The Yoga Barn reception desk. We are NOT able to process refunds for any reason if you contact us less than 24 hours prior to the published start time.  We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price.

Ticket Transfer:

Tickets are not transferrable to another person. The booking is only valid for the person whose name is printed on this ticket.

Late Arrival:

We recommend that you arrive 15 minutes prior to the start time. If you arrive after the published start time, you may be denied access and your booking will not be refunded.

Cancellation Policy:

If this event is canceled by The Yoga Barn prior to the start time, you are eligible for a refund of your ticket. We do not cover reimbursement of any associated booking fees that exceed our published ticket price. Please be aware that refunds may take up to 30 days.

events.title: Inversion Immersion: Diving Deep into Handstand Mastery
events.description:
Are you looking for a unique and fulfilling experience that connects you to yourself and the environment? Consider learning how to do a handstand. Inverting your body allows you to feel subtle vibrations and energy currents that exist within you and the world around you. Handstands offer a pathway to the sublime and foster awareness, inner peace, and personal growth.

But learning to do a handstand can be challenging. It requires letting go of preconceptions, developing trust, and utilizing inner fortitude and bravery. That's where our workshop comes in. We will teach you safe techniques to perform a handstand and which muscles to activate, as well as tips and tricks to enhance your practice. Whether you're a beginner or a seasoned practitioner, our workshop will equip you with the knowledge and skills to master the handstand and reach new heights of self-discovery.

Join us and tap into your full potential through the transformative power of the handstand taught by Ni Made Murni – ERYT 500.
